methodology: Structural parity evaluation of governance gate outcomes across equivalent input classes
evaluation_scope: AEM-EVOLVE multi-agent governance API — controlled environment — EthicBit / CEMU v3.7.0+
gate_outcome_reason: Fairness artifact verified. Attributes and methodology declared.

allowed_claim: Fairness evaluation evidence exists for [attributes] using [methodology] within [scope] as of [date].
